message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add patterns for scratch files commonly left behind by agent
experiments: *.orig, *.patch, and one-off test scripts (run_test.rs,
test_expand, test_expand.rs, test_ip.rs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -97,5 +97,13 @@ target_*/
 run_test
 tiny_test
 
+# Scratch/throwaway files (agent experiments, one-off debugging)
+*.orig
+*.patch
+run_test.rs
+test_expand
+test_expand.rs
+test_ip.rs
+
 # Build/test artifacts directory
 artifacts/
